template_description: Standard English resume template with ATS-friendly formatting

contact.notes: Place contact info at top, left-aligned. No header/footer.

summary.title: Summary
summary.guidelines: 2-3 sentences. Highlight 3-5 key qualifications. Tailor to target role. Include years of experience.
summary.example: Senior Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Proficient in Python, React, and AWS. Led team of 10 engineers to deliver 15+ projects on time and under budget.

work_experience.title: Work Experience

entries.guidelines: 3-5 bullet points per role. Start with action verb. Quantify achievements. Focus on results, not just duties.
entries.example_bullet: Developed Python scripts to automate data processing, reducing manual effort by 20 hours/week

work_experience.notes: Most recent job first. Use standard date format (Month Year).

entries.notes: Include GPA only if >3.5/4.0. Remove high school if you have a college degree.

skills.title: Skills
skills.notes: Group skills by category. Match JD keywords. List 10-15 most relevant skills.

projects.title: Projects

entries.guidelines: Include for entry-level or relevant side projects. Mention GitHub/portfolio links.
entries.example: E-Commerce Platform - Built full-stack e-commerce app using React, Node.js, MongoDB. Deployed on AWS with 99.9% uptime. github.com/username/project

projects.notes: Optional section. Include only if relevant to target role.

certifications.title: Certifications

entries.notes: Include industry-recognized certifications relevant to target role.

certifications.notes: Optional section. Include only if certification is recent (<5 years) and relevant.

font.name: Arial
font.notes: Use standard ATS-friendly fonts: Arial, Calibri, Times New Roman.

layout.notes: Use single-column layout for ATS compatibility. No tables, text boxes, or graphics.

do: Use standard section headings (Work Experience, Education, Skills)
Use standard fonts (Arial, Calibri, Times New Roman)
Place contact info in main body (not header/footer)
dont: Use tables, text boxes, or graphics
Use special characters or symbols (★, ➤, etc.)
Use scanned PDF (text must be selectable)

example_resume.summary: Senior Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Proficient in Python, React, and AWS. Led team of 10 engineers to deliver 15+ projects on time and under budget. Passionate about clean code and agile methodologies.

work_experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullet_points: Led team of 10 engineers to deliver 15+ projects on time and 20% under budget
Architected microservices platform using Python and Django, handling 1M+ daily active users
Reduced server costs by 40% ($50K/year) through cloud migration and optimization
Mentored 5 junior engineers, with 3 promoted to senior positions within 2 years

work_experience.title: Software Engineer
bullet_points: Developed RESTful APIs using Python and Flask, serving 500K+ requests/day
Built responsive web frontend using React and Redux, improving user engagement by 35%
Implemented CI/CD pipeline using Jenkins, reducing deployment time from 2 hours to 15 minutes
Collaborated with product and design teams to launch 3 major features in 12 months

projects.name: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: Built full-stack e-commerce web application with user authentication, payment processing, and order tracking
